## Summary Signal for PRISM

Julien is in a **probe-and-sense** mode. He's 6 months out from what he believes will be a real commitment to something — and he doesn't know what that something is yet. He's using high output (Grassroot Hopper launch prep, blog essays, framework rewrites) as a way to learn what's worth pursuing. Intelligence that helps him **evaluate nascent ideas** (what's working for independent creators, what early-stage products are gaining traction, what the landscape looks like for the kind of things he might build) is the highest-value briefing content right now. Business ops intelligence is secondary this week. The briefing should match his energy: generative, forward-looking, exploratory.
